donate:
This project is open-source and I do it in my free time. The donation will not enable any extra features. It is simply a way to thank the work behind a project like this.
If you'd like to donate, [click here](https://donate.dgongut.com).
Thank you so much ❤️
donors_list: 🦸 DropBot Heroes $1 Thank you all for using the bot! A special thanks to these heroes for their generosity and altruistic spirit by donating with the /donate command. Your support makes a difference! 🚀💙
dowload_asking: What do you want to download?
downloading:
$1 **Downloading...**
It may take a while depending on the file size
error_cannot_analyze_url:
❌ **Cannot download from this link.**

**Possible causes:**
• The site requires login (Instagram, Facebook, etc.)
• The content is private or has been deleted
• The site is not supported by yt-dlp

Try with public content from YouTube, TikTok, Twitter, Vimeo, etc.
error_file_extracted_user:
❌ **An error occurred while extracting the file:** `$1`

The file is on the server.

For more information, check the bot log.
error_getting_donors:
❌ **Error getting the donors list.**

Could not connect to the server. Please try again later.
error_sending_the_file_user: ❌ **Error sending the file.** The file is in the server.
error_telegram_timeout_user:
❌ **Error:** Telegram had internal issues while downloading `$1`.

The partial file has been deleted from the server.
error_trying_to_delete_folder_user: ❌ An attempt was made to delete the folder and it should not happen.
error_url_expired: ❌ **This download request has expired.** Please send the URL again.
error_url_failed_user:
❌ **The download from the URL has failed.**

**Possible causes:**
• The site is not supported by yt-dlp
• The URL is incorrect
• The content is not available

Check the bot log for more information.

user_not_admin:
❌ **This bot does not belong to you.**

If you want to download files to your server through Telegram, deploy me on your server.

Check out [DockerHub](https://hub.docker.com/r/dgongut/dropbot) where you will find a docker-compose.

Are you curious? The code is published on [GitHub](https://github.com/dgongut/dropbot).

If you have any questions, ask me, I’m @dgongut
version:
⚙️ **Version:** $1
Developed with ❤️ by @dgongut

If you encounter any issues or suggestions, contact me.

You can find everything related to this bot on [DockerHub](https://hub.docker.com/r/dgongut/dropbot) or on [GitHub](https://github.com/dgongut/dropbot).
welcome_message:
🫡 **DropBot at your service**

Send me a file and I will download it to your server in the corresponding folder.

Send me a link (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, etc.) to download the video or audio.
